abilities.name: scrappy
abilities.shortEffect: Lets the Pokémon's Normal and Fighting moves hit Ghost Pokémon.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon ignores Ghost-type Pokémon's immunity to Normal- and Fighting-type moves. Ghost Pokémon's other types affect damage as usual.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon can hit Ghost-type Pokémon with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. It is also unaffected by Intimidate.
